deviations.description: The process model only requires providing information on the nature of blood donations to first-time donors before obtaining consent. The updated requirement in Version 2 obligates this information to be provided to all donors before consent, regardless of donation history. The process violates this stricter requirement for repeat donors.

The modification of the activity name from 'provide_information_nature_of_blood_donations' to 'provide_information_on_nature_of_blood_donations' is a minor wording change and does not affect the compliance logic or process behavior.
